narrative.headline: One view of your whole home's air health — radon, mold, particulates, CO2, VOC — aggregated from every sensor on your LAN, with a local history no single vendor app gives you.
narrative.value_prop: Pulls AirThings (radon/VOC/mold), IQAir AirVisual (PM2.5/CO2/AQI) and MOCREO (room temp/humidity incl. crawlspace) into one local SQLite history, then answers mold and allergy questions across day/week/month/quarter/year/all-time.
narrative.when_to_use: Use to check whole-home air health, spot mold-risk humidity trends by room, track radon, and review allergy-relevant particulate/VOC/CO2 over any time window.

quickstart.comment: Pull the latest readings from every configured sensor into local history
Whole-home mold view: rooms over 60% RH this week
See every monitored room and its latest snapshot
Drill into one room's trend over a month

recipes.title: Mold risk this week
recipes.explanation: Flags rooms with sustained humidity at or above 60% RH plus any AirThings mold index.

recipes.title: Allergy load over a quarter
recipes.explanation: PM2.5, VOC and CO2 trends across the home for allergy sufferers.

recipes.title: Agent-native mold summary
recipes.explanation: Structured JSON narrowed to the flags and per-room mold exceedance for an agent to act on.

recipes.title: One room's full trend
recipes.explanation: Min/avg/max per metric for a single room over the year.

recipes.title: Backfill MOCREO history
recipes.explanation: MOCREO keeps server-side history; pull the last week in one shot.
